data.title: Senator Boozman states no agreement reached with Dems on crypto bill. GOP draft of market structure bill includes safeguards for crypto developers. Mark-up scheduled for next week.
data.description: A draft of the market structure bill has been released by the US Senate Agriculture Committee, which is led by Republicans. This bill includes safeguards for crypto developers and is scheduled for markup next week.

Russia is planning new strikes on Ukraine’s energy and nuclear support facilities, Kyiv warns. Since the start of the heating season, Moscow has carried out 256 airstrikes on Ukraine’s power and critical infrastructure.

data.title: Crypto market may hit $28 trillion by 2030 driven by Bitcoin, DeFi, and tokenization. ARK predicts Bitcoin to approach $1 million in 2030.
data.description: ARK Invest's most recent analysis maintains its prediction that Bitcoin will soar to nearly $1 million by 2030 due to increasing adoption.

data.title: Kristina Mustonen resigns as CEO of Arco Vara AS, stepping down from both Board and CEO roles on her own decision.
data.description: Kristina Mustonen, who serves as the Member of the Management Board and Chief Executive Officer at Arco Vara AS, has voluntarily decided to step down from her roles.

data.title: Season Two of "Youth of Wuhan" showcases 8 short videos revealing hidden codes of the city. New episode released daily.
data.description: In Wuhan, China, on January 22, 2026, according to a report from Changjiang Daily, Season Two of "Youth of Wuhan" has been launched with the release of eight short videos. Each episode is set to be released daily, aiming to showcase a different perspective of Wuhan that is not widely known. The series focuses on revealing the hidden gems of the city and highlights its unique charm.

data.title: Sasol reports business metrics for 6 months ending Dec 2025. Details at www.sasol.com/investor-centre/financial-results.
data.description: In Johannesburg on January 22, 2026, Sasol released its business performance data for the six months up to December 31, 2025. The information can be found on Sasol's official website, www.sasol.com, specifically under the Investor Centre section: https://www.sasol.com/investor-centre/financial-results.

data.title: Beko unveils Smart Living Index showing economic pressure drives surge in sustainable living globally.
data.description: In Istanbul on January 22, 2026, the renowned global home appliance company Beko introduced its exclusive Smart Living Index (SLI). This research highlights that financial factors are currently the primary catalyst for the increasing acceptance of sustainable practices in households across the globe. This study reflects a growing trend towards sustainable living, with financial considerations being cited as the main reason for this shift.
JPMorgan lifts its price target on Merck & Co Inc to $125, up from $120.

data.title: PAAMC HK recognized as one of "2025 Most Influential Overseas ETF Institutions" by Tonghuashun iFinD.
data.description: A recent event called the "Speak Together • Discover Value" Capital Market High-Quality Innovation & Development Forum and Tonghuashun iFinD 2025 Annual Awards Ceremony took place in Hangzhou. This event was attended by representatives from Shanghai and Hong Kong on Jan. 22, 2026. Ping An of China Asset Management (Hong Kong) Company was part of the event.

data.title: Finnish M&A deal value increased by 20% in 2025 despite flat transaction volumes, per Carner Corporate Finance.
data.description: In Helsinki on January 22, 2026, it was reported that Finland's M&A market seemed inactive in 2025. Despite a steady number of transactions, there was a significant rise in the total value of deals. This highlights a more complex situation in the market. The specifics of the increase in deal value were not disclosed.

data.title: Valmet's Beyond Circularity program ends after four years, part of Business Finland's Veturi initiative, marking significant R&D progress.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. EET in ESPOO, Finland, Valmet Oyj announced the completion of its largest research and development project, Beyond Circularity. This initiative, which lasted four years under Business Finland's Veturi initiative, marks a significant milestone for Valmet.

data.title: Investment firm Ark Invest teases "big ideas" for 2026 with cryptic ARKmoji, including AI and genomics, with varied speculations from followers.
data.description: Ark Invest recently released its "big ideas" for 2026 through a series of cryptic images dubbed "ARKmojis." The first image highlighted AI agents, with options like AI Agent Takeover, AI Consumer Op System, and Build-Your-Own-Agent garnering significant votes. Companies in Ark's portfolio aligning with this theme include Palantir Technologies Inc., Tempus AI Inc., and Shopify Inc. The second image featured a DNA helix, suggesting a focus on genomics, with ideas like molecular diagnostics and aging backwards receiving attention. Crispr Therapeutics AG is a prominent stock in Ark's portfolio related to genomics. Users can vote on their interpretations of the images on X.

data.title: FIH won't support KKCG Maritime's tender offer for Ferretti S.p.A.; plans to nominate majority of directors.
data.description: FIH, the controlling shareholder of Ferretti S.p.A., has confirmed its commitment to long-term investment in the company. They have announced plans to nominate a majority of the directors of Ferretti S.p.A. based in Milan. The announcement was made on January 22, 2026.

data.title: Government of Telangana partners with Blaize to launch AI Innovation Hub, signs MoU at Davos. (Numbers not specified)
data.description: In Davos, Switzerland on January 22, 2026, the Telangana government revealed a recent agreement with Blaize Inc., marking a significant step towards the launch of the Telangana AI project. The non-binding Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) was signed at the World Economic Forum, underscoring the commitment to this initiative. This news highlights the collaborative efforts between the two entities in the field of artificial intelligence.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin prioritizes decentralized social media for 2026 to boost online communication and competition.
data.description: One of the founders of Ethereum recently advocated for increased use of open social platforms, emphasizing that decentralized social media could enhance online communication by promoting competition.
